description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in urban casual attire, featuring a hooded sweatshirt layered under a utility vest with multiple pockets. The figure wears cargo pants with side pockets and high-top sneakers, giving a practical and street-ready appearance. The individual has short, neatly styled hair and wears rectangular eyeglasses, adding a modern, intellectual touch. The hands are relaxed and open at the sides, and the overall build is average and proportional. The clothing appears thick and suitable for cooler weather, with the vest and hoodie providing extra warmth. The figure's accessories and layered garments suggest readiness for various urban activities.
description: A male adult in urban casual wear, including a hooded sweatshirt, utility vest, cargo pants, and high-top sneakers, with short hair and eyeglasses.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hooded sweatshirt, utility vest with pockets, eyeglasses, and relaxed hand posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the hood, vest, and cargo pants pockets.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hooded sweatshirt, vest, and the relaxed stance.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the vest, pants, and sneakers.
attribute_clothing_type: hooded sweatshirt layered under a utility vest, cargo pants with side pockets, and high-top sneakers
